text:
Luciart (ルチアート, Ruchiāto) Hunter × Hunter Hunter Association Official Issue: Hunter's Guide; Character & World Official Databook (pg. 209) is a Greed Island player. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 14, Chapter 133 

Appearance

Luciart has short hair and wears a shirt. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

After Gon and Killua obtain their first specified slot card, "Sword of Truth", in the city of Antokiba, Luciart appears together with a number of long-time players with the intention of stealing it. As there are several people wishing to take a single card, they must use rock-paper-scissors to decide who will steal it. 

Eventually, a white dot is seen next to his name in Gon's book, indicating he's still alive. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 158 

Abilities & Power

Nen

Due to being able to access Greed Island, Luciart is capable of utilizing Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Though Luciart's name is technically given in the manga through Gon's Greed Island binder, the correspondence between the character and his name is only provided in the Hunter's Guide databook.
